name: Rhubarb-Apple Crisp
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh rhubarb, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the fruits and place the rhubarb in an ungreased baking dish, 6x10 inch. Sprinkle with salt.
2. Measure sugar, flour, and cinnamon and apple pie spice into a bowl. Add butter and mix thoroughly until mixture is crumbly. Sprinkle evenly over rhubarb.
3. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes, until topping is golden brown. Serve warm with Cool Whip or Vanilla ice cream.
